title: citrus × bigaradia var. corniculata
intro: Citrus × bigaradia var. corniculata, also known as the bitter orange or Seville sour orange, is a variety of citrus plant that is primarily grown for its sour fruit and medicinal properties. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Citrus × bigaradia var. corniculata include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and even promoting weight loss. Citrus × bigaradia var. corniculata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
